zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Gerard於1467年出生時，她的父親Sir Thomas Gerard36歲，母親Cecily Fouleshurst25歲。她於1480年與Sir John Warren在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年2月14日在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Gerard于1467年出生时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Gerard36岁，母亲Cecily Fouleshurst25岁。她于1480年与Sir John Warren在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年2月14日在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

variants.name: Gerardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Enzo, Gaspare, Luigi, Rocco, Antonio, Canio, Carmine, Filippo, Francesco, Giovanni, Libero.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the ancient Germanic personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ). This surname is also found in southern France.
German and French (mainly Nord): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name German Gerhard , French Gérard (see Gerard ), using the genitive of the Latinized form Gerardus.

variants.name: Garrison
meanings: English: from a shortened form of Middle English Gerardson, a patronymic from the personal name Gerard + son, or an Anglicized form of its Dutch cognate Gerritsen . The English surname is probably in most cases of Flemish or Dutch origin. It was brought to Britain by immigrants from the Low Countries, especially in the 15th and 16th centuries.
Americanized form of Jewish   Gerson   (see   Gershon  ).
Americanized form of Dutch   Gerritsen  .

variants.name: Garrard
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Gerard  .
Altered form of French Gérard (see Gerard ).
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Geenen
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Geen, a pet form of Gerard .

variants.name: Gerardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Alberto, Alfredo, Aurelio, Carlos, Jesus, Juan, Norberto, Ramon, Tomas, Ana.  Italian Antonio, Carmine, Dino, Enrico, Marco, Marco Antonio.
Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ).

variants.name: Gerald
meanings: English (of Norman origin); French (Gérald): from the ancient Germanic personal name Gerald, Girald, composed of the elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ and wald ‘power, authority’. It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was fairly common, but less so than Gerard , with which it was early confused. In France the much more common variants of this surname are Géraud and Giraud .

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: English: variant of   Gerard  .

variants.name: Geron
meanings: French (Géron): from the personal name Gero, Gerone, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with the element gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, as for example Gérard (see Gerard ).
Altered form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
English (Lancashire): of Norman origin, from the personal name Geron of ancient Germanic origin, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gherardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Silvio, Alessandro, Angelo, Antonio, Donato, Egidio, Ennio, Enzo, Gildo, Lucio, Luigi, Primo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Gherardo, one of themany Italian equivalents of Gerard .

variants.name: Garard
meanings: English (London and Buckinghamshire): variant of   Gerard  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Elinor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Gerard was born in 1467, her father, Sir Thomas Gerard, was 36 and her mother, Cecily Fouleshurst, was 25. She married Sir John Warren in 1480, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 14 February 1561, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Gerard est née en 1467, son père, Sir Thomas Gerard, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecily Fouleshurst, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Warren en 1480, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1561, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Gerard 1467 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Gerard 36 und ihre Mutter Cecily Fouleshurst 25. Sie hat 1480 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Warren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1561 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Gerard è nata il nel 1467, sua padre, Sir Thomas Gerard, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Cecily Fouleshurst, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Warren nel 1480, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1561, nel Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Gerardが1467年に生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Gerardは36歳，母Cecily Fouleshurstは25歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでSir John Warrenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年2月14日にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Gerard(이)가 1467년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Gerard(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Fouleshurst(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir John Warren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Gerard nasceu em 1467, seu pai, Sir Thomas Gerard, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Fouleshurst, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Warren em 1480, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1561, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Gerard родилась в 1467 г., её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Gerard было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Fouleshurst, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Warren в 1480 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 14 февраля 1561 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет.
